handler.prompt: A file was just written: $ARGUMENTS. Read the changed file and README.md. This is an MCP server deployed on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime via Terraform. Check whether the README is still accurate by verifying: (1) Project Structure — does it reflect the actual files and folders on disk? (2) Tools table — does it match the tools currently registered in mcp_server.py? (3) Environment Variables — do they match what is defined in mcp_server.py and the Dockerfile? (4) Terraform deployment steps — are they consistent with the terraform/ directory? (5) AgentCore Best Practices — do they reflect the actual Dockerfile and mcp_server.py implementation? (6) Observability — does it match the Dockerfile CMD and pyproject.toml dependencies? Report exactly what is outdated and needs fixing, without making any changes.
